Even though the technique itself is relatively straightforward, it serves as a good starting point for low-resource models. Overall, the findings point toward the possibility of significant future advancements (in model expansion) with higher-level performance still able to retain their ability to be interpreted.

</details>


### [408] [Sparse Autoencoders for Interpretable Emotion Control in Text-to-Speech](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01479)
*Hongfei Du,Jiacheng Shi,Sidi Lu,Gang Zhou,Ye Gao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文利用稀疏自编码器(SAEs)分析LLM-based TTS模型中的情感相关潜在特征，并提出一种无需修改骨干网络参数的特征级干预框架，实现可解释的双向情感诱导与抑制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM-based TTS系统虽提升了语音表现力，但情感控制缺乏可解释性，现有方法依赖外部条件或全局激活引导，难以理解内部表征。

Method: 使用稀疏自编码器(SAEs)识别语义隐藏状态中的稀疏潜在特征，分析情感变化分布，并构建特征级干预框架进行双向情感诱导与抑制。

Result: 情感变化分布在多个稀疏潜在特征上，干预其中一小部分子集即可实现可解释的情感控制；不同潜在特征与特定声学属性（如音高）相关联。

Conclusion: 所提特征级干预框架在情感诱导与抑制性能上达到或超越全局引导及现有TTS基线方法，情感表达源自多个潜在特征的协调贡献而非单一全局变化。

Abstract: Integrating large language models (LLMs) into text-to-speech (TTS) systems has improved speech expressiveness, yet interpretable emotional control remains challenging. Existing approaches primarily rely on external conditioning or global activation steering, offering limited insight into the internal representations underlying emotional control. In this work, we analyze emotion-related variation in the semantic hidden states of LLM-based TTS models using sparse autoencoders (SAEs) to identify sparse latent features. Our analysis shows that emotional variation is distributed across multiple sparse latent features, while intervening on a small subset enables interpretable emotion control. Building on this observation, we introduce a feature-level intervention framework for bidirectional emotion induction and suppression without modifying backbone parameters. We further show that distinct latent features are associated with specific acoustic attributes (e.g., pitch), suggesting that emotional expression arises from coordinated latent contributions rather than a single global shift. Empirically, steering these sparse latent features achieves comparable or superior emotion induction and suppression performance relative to global steering and existing TTS baselines.

</details>


### [409] [Beyond Topical Similarity: Contrastive Evidence Retrieval with Interpretable Attention Alignment in RAG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01482)
*Francielle Vargas,João Robiatti,Diego Alves,Lucas Pascotti Valem,Maximilian Seeth,Sebastián Ferrada,Ameeta Agrawal,Daniel Pedronette,André Freitas*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: CERA是一种基于对比学习与可解释注意力对齐的检索框架，通过主观性硬负样本选择和证据性归纳偏置注入，在临床试验报告检索中提升了事实性和可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RAG系统在事实性和可解释性方面仍存在开放且紧迫的问题，现有方法难以确保检索结果既准确又可解释。

Method: 提出CERA框架，采用主观性硬负样本选择策略，结合三元组对比学习和可解释注意力对齐两个训练目标，其中注意力对齐通过POS加权的掩码分布监督CLS到token的注意力，以人类标注的事实理由作为证据信号。

Result: 在大规模临床试验报告语料上，主观性硬负样本选择显著优于Contriever和基线方法；理由对齐在保持竞争力的检索性能同时提升了 faithfulness。

Conclusion: 注意力在人类理由引导下可作为模型行为更忠实的解释，CERA使检索器能够识别支持证据的具体token，推动RAG系统中更可解释的证据选择。

Abstract: Ensuring factuality and interpretability in RAG remains an open and urgent problem. We introduce Contrastive Evidence Rationale Attention (CERA), the first retrieval framework to employ subjectivity-based hard negative selection and inject an evidential inductive bias into contrastive learning through an auxiliary attention alignment loss. CERA fine-tunes a dense retriever using two training objectives: triplet-based contrastive learning and interpretable attention alignment, which supervises CLS-to-token attention using a part-of-speech-weighted masking distribution over human-annotated factual rationales as evidence signals. Experiments on a large corpus of clinical trial reports demonstrate that the subjectivity-based hard negative selection substantially improves retrieval effectiveness compared to both Contriever and hard negative selection baselines. Furthermore, rationale alignment improves faithfulness while maintaining competitive retrieval performance, supporting the hypothesis that attention can serve as a more faithful explanation of model behavior when guided by human rationales. Moving beyond topical similarity, CERA enables the retriever to identify the specific tokens that constitute supporting evidence, promoting more interpretable evidence selection in RAG systems.

</details>


### [410] [TimeSage-MT: A Multi-Turn Benchmark for Evaluating Agentic Time Series Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01498)
*Yaxuan Kong,Qingren Yao,Yuqi Nie,Yichen Li,Yilei Shao,Stefan Zohren,Anna Vettoruzzo,Joaquin Vanschoren,Ming Jin,Qingsong Wen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出TimeSage-MT，一个面向多轮对话时间序列推理的基准测试，包含240个任务和2680轮对话，覆盖8个真实领域，揭示了现有大语言模型在决策导向任务中的关键缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列分析基准仅关注单步任务（如预测、异常检测），忽略了实际应用中用户目标演变、需基于先前分析积累证据的多轮对话场景，缺乏评估智能体在多轮交互中进行时间序列推理能力的基准。

Method: 通过可复现的流水线将真实时间序列数据转换为多轮对话，构建240个任务、2680轮对话的基准；提出TimeSage结构化智能体，配备时间序列技能库；设计统一评估协议和公共排行榜。

Result: 前沿大语言模型在决策导向任务上性能显著下降，主要失败原因包括记忆不足、不确定性处理不当和基于领域的决策能力缺失。

Conclusion: TimeSage-MT暴露了当前智能体推理中的关键差距，为未来时间序列分析智能体系统的开发提供了严格的评估基础。

Abstract: Time series data inform critical decisions across many real-world domains. While large language model (LLM) agents can analyze data through natural language and tools, it remains unclear whether they can conduct reliable time series analysis across multi-turn conversations. Existing benchmarks focus on single-step tasks such as forecasting and anomaly detection, overlooking practical workflows where user goals evolve, agents must build on prior analyses, and conclusions emerge from accumulated evidence. In this work, we introduce TimeSage-MT, a multi-turn benchmark for agentic time series reasoning with 240 tasks and 2,680 dialogue turns across 8 real-world domains, spanning basic exploration to decision-oriented analysis. TimeSage-MT is built through a reproducible pipeline that converts real-world time series data into multi-turn conversations with verifiable answers. It provides a unified evaluation protocol and public leaderboard for comparing time series agentic systems. To demonstrate the benchmark's utility, we evaluate frontier LLMs alongside TimeSage, a novel structured agent equipped with a comprehensive time series skill library. The results show sharp performance drops on decision-oriented tasks, driven by failures in memory, uncertainty handling, and domain-based decision making. TimeSage-MT exposes critical gaps in current agentic reasoning and provides a rigorous foundation for future development.

</details>


### [411] [Identifying High-Confidence Social Biases in LLMs for Trustworthy Conversational Tutoring Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01584)
*Aitor Arronte Alvarez,Naiyi Xie Fincham*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究揭示LLM在对话式辅导场景中存在高置信度的社会偏见，模型对偏见判断错误时仍保持高度自信，且这种过度自信会影响其推理和反馈质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在对话式辅导系统中的应用日益广泛，但其可能延续或放大刻板偏见，在教育场景中构成特殊风险，因此需要评估LLM在这种自然教学环境中的偏见表现。

Method: 提出一种新的数据集生成方法，通过再生学生-AI辅导对话并引入受控偏见，结合计算评估和人工评估，测试多个LLM在对话式辅导中检测刻板偏见的能力、置信度及推理过程。

Result: 对话式辅导中的偏见检测比传统基准测试更具挑战性；最先进的LLM对错误的偏见判断表现出过度自信；模型置信度显著影响推理和反馈质量。

Conclusion: LLM在辅导对话中可能存在过度自信的偏见行为，需关注其风险、缓解策略及未来研究方向。

Abstract: Conversational tutoring agents have been shown to improve learning engagement and student outcomes, and large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in these systems to provide scalable, personalized feedback. However, LLMs may perpetuate or amplify stereotypical social biases, posing particular risks in educational settings.
  In this study, we evaluate LLMs in conversational tutoring scenarios to identify high-confidence social biases, instances where models are unable to identify biased judgments in tutoring conversations while maintaining strong confidence in their assessments, potentially affecting their reasoning and the feedback they provide to learners. We present a new dataset generation method that enables bias evaluation under naturalistic instructional conditions by regenerating student-AI tutor interactions and introducing turns with controlled bias derived from a benchmark dataset.
  Using this data, we assess multiple LLMs' ability to detect stereotypical biases and analyze the confidence and reasoning underlying their responses through computational and human evaluations. We find that bias detection is substantially more challenging in conversational tutoring contexts than in benchmark-based evaluations, and that state-of-the-art LLMs are overconfident in their incorrect assessments of stereotypical bias statements. Moreover, model confidence strongly influences reasoning and feedback, highlighting the risks of overconfident, biased behavior in LLM-based tutoring agents. We conclude by discussing implications, mitigation considerations, and directions for future research.

</details>


### [412] [EvoPool: Evolutionary Programmatic Annotation for Label-Efficient Specialized Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01617)
*Tianyi Xu,Yaolun Zhang,Xuan Ouyang,Huazheng Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: EvoPool是一个受达尔文进化论启发的多智能体框架，通过进化策略筛选高质量标注器，并利用EvoAgg聚合生成软标签，在多个专业领域任务中超越LLM标注基线，同时速度提升4500-31000倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在通用任务上表现优异，但在标注成本高昂的专业高风险领域（如生物医学、法律等）不如小型监督模型，亟需一种高效且高质量的自动化标注方法。

Method: 提出EvoPool多智能体进化框架，包含三个专业智能体迭代生成可执行标注代码，通过小规模验证集提供适应度信号，经由确定性门控（存活检查、多样性检查、边际贡献检查）筛选标注器；再通过EvoPool文本感知聚合器结合语义特征与投票特征生成软训练标签。

Result: 在8个LLM弱势任务中7个超越最强LLM标注基线，平均macro-F1提升0.141，ChemProt上最高提升0.301，PubMed上提升0.265；每样本成本接近零，处理10万样本速度比LLM标注快4500至31000倍。

Conclusion: EvoPool证明了进化式多智能体协作在专业领域自动化标注中的有效性，兼顾了高质量与高效率，为数据稀缺的高风险领域提供了一种可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Large language models excel at general tasks but underperform smaller supervised models in specialized, high-stakes domains where training labels are costly. We address this regime with EvoPool, an evolutionary multi-agent framework inspired by Darwinian evolution. Three specialized agents iteratively propose executable annotator code, a small validation set provides a fitness signal, and a deterministic gate keeps only annotators that pass viability, diversity, and marginal-contribution checks across generations. Pool votes are mapped to soft training labels by EvoAgg, a text-aware aggregator combining semantic features with annotator-vote features. The authored pool runs at near-zero per-example cost and is 4500 to 31000x faster than LLM annotation on 100K examples. Across 7 of 8 LLM-weak specialized and complex tasks spanning biomedical relation extraction, legal-clause classification, complex reasoning, and dense multi-label biomedical classification, EvoPool beats the strongest LLM annotation baseline by an average +0.141 macro-F1, peaking at +0.301 on ChemProt and +0.265 on PubMed. Code is available at: https://github.com/tianyi0216/EvoPool

</details>


### [413] [Benchmarking LLM-as-a-Judge for Long-Form Output Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01629)
*Junjie Chen,Yuxi Dong,Haitao Li,Weihang Su,Yujia Zhou,Min Zhang,Yiqun Liu,Qinyao Ai*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了LongJudgeBench基准，用于评估LLM作为评委在长文本生成评价中的可靠性，发现现有模型在不同场景下表现不稳定，即使提供评分标准或参考答案仍存在显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的元评估基准主要关注短文本输出，而随着LLM越来越多地用于长文本生成，长文本输出的可靠评估成为一个关键挑战。

Method: 构建了LongJudgeBench基准，涵盖多种真实场景和评判协议，系统评估了多种LLM评委（涵盖多种基础模型和评判设置）。

Result: 当前LLM评委在不同场景下表现不稳定，评分标准或参考答案虽有助于评估但并非总是充分有效，存在显著的可靠性差距。

Conclusion: LongJudgeBench可为未来更稳健、更注重上下文、与人类对齐的LLM-as-a-judge方法研究提供支持。

Abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for long-form generation, reliably evaluating long-form outputs has become a critical challenge. LLM-as-a-judge offers a scalable alternative to human evaluation, yet its reliability in long-form output evaluation remains underexamined: existing meta-evaluation benchmarks focus mainly on short-form outputs. Compared with short-form evaluation, long-form evaluation is not merely a matter of output length; it often requires judges to handle more complex document-level demands. In this work, we introduce LongJudgeBench, a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating LLM judges on long-form outputs across diverse real-world scenarios and judging protocols. We systematically evaluate a broad range of LLM judges, covering multiple base models and judging settings. Our results reveal a substantial reliability gap: current LLM judges remain unstable across scenarios, and rubrics or references are helpful but not always sufficient. We hope LongJudgeBench will support future research on more robust, context-aware, and human-aligned LLM-as-a-judge methods. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/LongJudgeBench-F782.

</details>


### [414] [AlphaToken: Decoupling Adaptation and Stability for Path-Aware Response Token Valuation in LLM Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01635)
*Liu Qing,Ou Wu,Yi Du*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出AlphaToken框架，通过解耦适应性和稳定性两个目标，对响应令牌进行路径感知的价值评估，在微调和偏好优化中屏蔽低价值令牌，提升后训练效果并缓解灾难性遗忘。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有令牌选择方法多依赖局部启发式规则，缺乏对单个响应令牌进行原则性价值评估的框架。

Method: 将令牌价值评估解耦为适应性（促进目标任务学习）和稳定性（保持预训练能力）两个目标，结合局部令牌梯度的直接路径信号与自回归生成中的下游因果路径信号实现路径感知；利用Fisher-drift代理近似稳定性，扩展Ghost Dot-Product实现高效计算。

Result: AlphaToken在微调和偏好优化中提升了后训练性能，并有效缓解了灾难性遗忘问题。

Conclusion: AlphaToken作为一种原则性的响应令牌价值评估框架，优于基于局部启发式的现有方法。

Abstract: Token selection is pivotal for effective LLM post-training. However, existing methods mostly rely on local heuristics and rarely formulate token selection as a principled valuation of individual response tokens. We introduce $\textbf{AlphaToken}$, a response token valuation framework that decouples valuation into $\textbf{adaptation}$ (promoting target-task learning) and $\textbf{stability}$ (preserving pre-trained capabilities), and makes each objective $\textbf{path-aware}$ by combining the direct-path signal from local token gradients with the downstream causal-path signal in autoregressive generation. Since retention data are typically unavailable, AlphaToken approximates stability via a $\textbf{Fisher-drift proxy}$ anchored at the pre-trained reference model. For efficient computation, we extend Ghost Dot-Product to token-level valuation. AlphaToken masks low-value response tokens during fine-tuning and preference optimization, concentrating training signals on more valuable positions. Experiments show that AlphaToken improves post-training performance and mitigates catastrophic forgetting.

</details>


### [415] [Easier to Mislead Than to Correct: Harmful and Beneficial Revision in LLM Conformity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01637)
*Jiaming Qu,Lucheng fu,Yibo Hu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究发现LLM在多智能体系统中容易从众，且被误导的概率远高于被纠正的概率；权威标签会加剧盲目从众；常见的推理干预方法无法可靠地减少有害修正。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究LLM在多智能体系统中面对同伴答案时的从众行为，特别是这种从众是带来更多纠错还是引入新错误，以及社会线索（共识结构、权威标签）的影响。

Method: 让LLM先回答一个问题，然后展示模拟的同伴回应，最后让模型做最终决策。操纵两种社会线索（共识结构和权威标签），测量对有益修正和有害修正的影响。使用4个开源LLM和7个QA数据集。

Result: 同伴共识更容易误导原本正确的模型，而非纠正原本错误的模型。权威标签使模型更倾向于选择被认可的回答，无论其对错。链式思维和反思等通用推理干预无法可靠地减少有害修正同时保留有益修正。

Conclusion: 多智能体LLM系统应验证同伴答案，而非简单聚合。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used in multi-agent systems, where they see and respond to other agents' answers. A key risk is conformity: a model may abandon its own answer simply because others agree on a different one. Prior studies show that LLMs often revise toward a majority answer, but it remains unclear whether these revisions help correct mistakes as often as they introduce new errors. In this paper, we conduct a controlled study in which an LLM first answers a question, then sees simulated peer responses before making a final decision. We manipulate two social cues: consensus structure and authority labels assigned to peers, and measure how they influence beneficial and harmful revisions. Across four open-weight LLMs and seven QA datasets, we find that peer agreement makes it much easier to mislead initially correct models than to correct initially wrong ones. Authority labels make models more likely to choose the endorsed answer, regardless of whether it is correct. More concerningly, generic reasoning interventions such as chain-of-thought and reflection do not reliably reduce harmful revision while preserving beneficial revision. These findings suggest that multi-agent LLM systems should verify peer answers rather than simply aggregate them.

</details>


### [416] [When Meaning Travels: A Granular Lens on Hybrid-MoE's Role in Idiomatic Understanding for Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01671)
*Sarmistha Das,Vaibhav Vishal,Shreyas Guha,Amaan Ali,Kitsuchart Pasupa,Sriparna Saha*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Varnika多模态习语语料库和HybridMoE框架，在低资源东南亚语言（印地语、孟加拉语、泰语）的习语理解和跨语言迁移上取得了5-6%的性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低资源东南亚语言（如印地语、孟加拉语、泰语）中富含文化隐喻的习语对计算建模和跨语言迁移构成重大挑战，现有方法难以保留其比喻性和文化语义。

Method: 构建Varnika多模态习语语料库（3,533条习语，含七种习语语调及图文对齐）；提出HybridMoE框架，通过可控混合策略整合选定与未选定专家的输出以缓解专家稀疏性，并引入习语属性信号（掩码多模态嵌入）增强表示。

Result: HybridMoE在多种先进视觉语言模型上取得5-6%的性能提升，有效改善了对比喻性语言和文化嵌入语义的表征。

Conclusion: 所提方法在多语言多模态场景下显著提升了对比喻性语言和文化嵌入语义的表征能力，验证了混合专家机制在低资源习语理解中的有效性。

Abstract: In the contemporary epoch of multilingual education, learning idioms provides a fascinating gateway towards creativity, cultural values, historical context, and diverse perspectives inherent to various linguistic traditions. This paper showcases the navigation of retaining figurative and cultural semantics in low-resource Southeast Asian languages such as Hindi, Bengali, and Thai, where culturally rich idioms pose significant obstacles for computational modeling and cross-linguistic transfer due to their deep metaphorical complexity. To tackle such complexity, we present Varnika, a reconstructed multimodal idiom corpus comprising 3,533 multilingual idioms, enriched with seven idiomatic tones aligned with both textual and visual representations. Additionally, to infer informative idiomatic understanding, we introduce a Hybrid Mixture-of-Experts (HybridMoE) framework that embeds multiple idiomatic expert opinions while mitigating expert sparsity by integrating outputs from both selected and unselected experts through controlled hybridization, further augmented with Idiomatic Property Signals via masked multimodal embeddings. To analyze the performance across multiple dimensions, we propose the IDIO-TONE and Idiomatic Validation Score, a three-stage evaluation pipeline measuring (i) literal translation fidelity, (ii) visual-semantic alignment, and (iii) idiomatic meaning retention. Empirical evaluations highlight that HybridMoE achieves 5--6\% performance gains across advanced vision language models, demonstrating improved representation of figurative language and culturally embedded meaning in multilingual multimodal settings

</details>


### [417] [Why Do Self-Harm Prediction Models Struggle to Generalise? Lexical and Semantic Variations in Emergency Department Triage Notes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01678)
*Liuliu Chen,Mike Conway,Jo Robinson,Vlada Rozova*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了不同医院急诊科分诊笔记中自我伤害表述的词汇差异如何影响NLP模型的跨机构泛化性能，发现尽管核心主题一致（如自我中毒、自我伤害），但词汇表达和特征重要性的差异会导致模型性能下降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自我伤害与高自杀风险密切相关，NLP模型在单医院内检测效果好，但跨机构时性能下降。为探究原因，作者比较了两家医院的分诊笔记。

Method: 通过分析两家医院急诊分诊笔记的词汇特征、高度相关的预测特征以及显著主题，比较其差异。

Result: 两家医院的自我伤害相关表述在词汇和特征重要性上存在差异，尽管核心主题（如自我中毒、自我伤害）一致。这些差异与跨站点性能下降相关。

Conclusion: 机构差异影响临床文本中自我伤害的识别，研究为提升NLP模型泛化能力提供了改进方向。

Abstract: Self-harm presentations to emergency departments (EDs) are strongly associated with higher suicide risk. NLP models have shown robust performance in detecting self-harm from triage notes within single hospitals, yet performance often declines across institutions. To examine potential causes, we compare ED triage notes from two hospitals by analyzing lexical characteristics, highly associated predictive features, and salient topics. Our results reveal variation in lexical expression and feature importance related to self-harm across hospitals, despite consistent core themes such as self-poisoning and self-injury. These documentation differences are associated with reduced cross-site performance. Our findings provide insight into how institutional variation affects the identification of self-harm in clinical text and highlight potential methods to improve model generalisability.

</details>


### [418] [Encoded but Not Routed: Explaining the Table-Chart Gap in Scientific Claim Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01679)
*Sunisth Kumar,Xanh Ho,Tim Schopf,Andre Greiner-Petter,Florian Boudin,Akiko Aizawa*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 多模态大模型在科学同行评审中，从图表中提取信息的能力与表格相当，但无法将提取的信息用于最终预测，导致“表格-图表差距”本质上是信息路由失败而非编码失败。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前研究表明多模态LLM在处理表格证据时的表现显著优于处理相同数据的图表证据，但原因不明。本文旨在探究模型是从图表中提取信息失败，还是提取了信息但未能用于预测。

Method: 对三个开源视觉语言模型（VLMs）进行逐层线性探测（layer-wise linear probing）和注意力分析，比较表格和图表两种证据形式（基于相同数据）在模型中间表示中的信息编码与利用情况。

Result: 图表信息确实被编码在模型的中间表示中，但未能到达预测位置；表格则不存在此问题。注意力分析进一步揭示，这种信息断联在不同模型家族中表现出两种不同的架构形式。

Conclusion: “表格-图表差距”的本质不是模型无法从图表中编码信息，而是编码后的视觉信息在预测时未能被有效路由（routing）到决策位置，即信息提取与利用之间存在脱节。

Abstract: Multimodal LLMs are increasingly used to assist scientific peer review, where a core requirement is verifying whether claims in a paper are supported by its evidence. Prior work has shown that models perform substantially better at this task when the evidence is a table than when it is a chart of the same underlying data. This raises the question of whether models fail to extract information from charts, or do they extract it but fail to use it when forming their prediction? We study this question through layer-wise linear probing and attention analysis on three open-weight VLMs over table and chart evidence, representing the same underlying data. We find consistent evidence for the latter. Chart information is encoded in the models' intermediate representations but does not reach the prediction position, a gap that is absent for tables and holds across all conditions tested. Attention analysis further reveals that this disconnect takes two architecturally distinct forms across model families. These findings reframe the table-chart gap as a failure of how encoded visual information is routed at prediction time, rather than a failure of encoding itself.

</details>


### [419] [Off-the-Shelf LLMs as Process Scorers: Training-Free Alternative to PRMs for Mathematical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01682)
*Atoosa Chegini,Soheil Feizi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需训练的块级引导生成方法（Chunk-Level Guided Generation），利用大模型对小模型生成的固定长度候选块进行评分和选择，在数学推理任务上优于多数投票和PRM引导搜索，且生成更短的推理路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推理时策略存在两个问题：使用强模型对弱模型完整输出进行评分时，弱模型可能已陷入错误推理路径；PRM引导搜索需要步骤级标签训练奖励模型，成本高且不可直接使用现成模型。

Method: 提出Chunk-Level Guided Generation框架：小模型每步采样k个固定长度候选块，大模型用对数似然评分选择最优块，采用两种选择规则（LGS选长度归一化似然最高的块，CGS减去小模型对数似然以偏好分歧大的块），通过固定长度避免长度偏差。

Result: 在GSM8K、MATH等五个数学基准上，CGS相比多数投票提升最多28个百分点；在匹配引导预算下，无需奖励模型训练即可匹敌或超越PRM引导搜索；在MATH和Minerva Math上分别达81.8%和63.6%；生成推理痕迹显著短于PRM引导搜索。

Conclusion: 固定长度块级引导是一种有效的训练免费替代方案，避免了PRM的训练成本与长度偏差问题，兼顾性能与效率。

Abstract: Selecting the best response from multiple small-model samples using a stronger scorer is a simple inference-time strategy, but fails when the small model has already committed to incorrect reasoning paths. PRM guided search avoids this by scoring candidate continuations during generation, but requires a reward model trained with step-level labels.
  We propose Chunk-Level Guided Generation, a training-free alternative that uses an off-the-shelf large language model as a process scorer. At each step, a small model samples k fixed-length candidate chunks, while the larger model scores the candidates using likelihoods without generating any text. The selected chunk is committed before the next step, steering generation before errors can propagate.
  We instantiate this framework with two selection rules: Likelihood-Guided Selection (LGS), which selects the chunk with the highest length-normalized large-model log-probability, and Contrastive-Guided Selection (CGS), which subtracts the small model's log-probability to favor chunks where the large model's preference diverges from the small model's. We show that scoring variable-length reasoning steps with large-model likelihoods is unreliable due to a systematic length bias that persists even after length normalization, and that fixed-length chunks avoid this confound.
  On GSM8K, MATH, Minerva Math, AMC23, and AIME24 with Qwen2.5-1.5B guided by Qwen2.5-32B and Llama-3.2-1B guided by Llama-3.1-70B, CGS outperforms majority voting by up to 28 pp and, under matched guidance budgets, matches or outperforms Qwen2.5-Math-PRM-72B guided search on most benchmarks without reward-model training. With Qwen2.5-7B guided by Qwen2.5-72B, CGS reaches 81.8% on MATH and 63.6% on Minerva Math at k=16, surpassing majority voting by 4--6 pp. Finally, Chunk-Level Guided Generation produces substantially shorter reasoning traces than PRM guided search.

</details>


### [420] [RCEM: Embedder Equipped with Query Rewriting Skill for Robust Conversational Search in Distributional Shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01697)
*Kilho Son,Paul Hsu,Cha Zhang,Dinei Florencio*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: RCEM是一个对话式稠密检索模型，通过将LLM的查询改写能力蒸馏到嵌入模型中，实现了无需显式查询重写即可进行上下文感知检索，在多个基准上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对话式搜索在RAG系统中日益重要，但现有方法依赖显式查询重写或需要昂贵的对话-文档相关性标注，且面对分布偏移时鲁棒性不足。

Method: 将大语言模型的查询改写能力蒸馏到嵌入模型中，使对话查询嵌入与改写后的查询嵌入对齐，无需显式查询重写和对话-文档相关性标注。

Result: 在QReCC、TopiOCQA和TREC CAsT上持续优于强基线，在分布偏移场景下Recall@10提升高达20%。

Conclusion: RCEM在保持原始检索功能的同时扩展了嵌入模型的对话查询改写能力，支持单一模型处理独立查询和对话查询，无需重建检索数据库。

Abstract: Conversational search has become increasingly important in retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems, where users interact with AI assistants through multi-turn conversations containing context-dependent queries. We propose RCEM, a conversational dense retrieval model that distills the query reformulation capability of LLMs into the embedding model, enabling context-aware retrieval without explicit query rewriting during inference. Unlike prior conversational dense retrieval approaches that learn direct conversation-to-document matching, RCEM aligns conversational-query embeddings with rewritten-query embeddings, improving robustness under distributional shift. RCEM does not require conversational query-to-document relevance mappings for training, which are often expensive and difficult to obtain with high quality. Extensive experiments on QReCC, TopiOCQA, and TREC CAsT demonstrate that RCEM consistently outperforms strong conversational retrieval baselines, achieving particularly large gains under distributional shift, including up to 20% improvement in Recall@10. RCEM further extends the base embedding model with conversational query rewriting capability while preserving its original retrieval functionality, allowing both standalone and conversational queries to be encoded by a single model and searched against existing document indexes without rebuilding the retrieval database.

</details>


### [421] [Argument Collapse: LLMs Flatten Long-Form Public Debate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01736)
*Yekyung Kim,Yapei Chang,Chau Minh Pham,Mohit Iyyer*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究发现，LLM生成的文章在论点、子论点和段落结构上存在显著的趋同现象（论点坍缩），相比之下人类文章更加多样化和具体化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM被越来越多地用于生成面向公众的论证文本，它们可能会通过反复引入相同且看似合理的论点，导致公共辩论的同质化，使讨论空间变窄。

Method: 比较了1,039条人类对《纽约时报》辩论的回应、448条人类对《波士顿评论》论坛的回应，以及23,384篇LLM生成的文章，从主论点、子论点和段落结构三个层面分析论点多样性的差异。

Result: NYT语料中，65.3%的人类主论点是辩论中独有的，而LLM仅3.4%；即使让LLM生成多样答案，也只能恢复约一半的人类独特论点。子论点层面，同一主论点下人类子论点独特性为41.0%，LLM仅9.1%。结构上LLM文章更固定，常以直接主张开头、快速转向建议。

Conclusion: LLM生成的文章存在显著的论点坍缩现象，且这种趋势在短篇和长篇文本中均成立，表明LLM可能削弱公共讨论的多样性和深度。

Abstract: As LLMs are increasingly used to draft public-facing arguments, they may flatten public debate by repeatedly introducing the same polished, plausible arguments. We study argument collapse, the tendency of essays generated by different LLMs to converge to a smaller set of main arguments, sub-arguments, and paragraph-level structures. We compare 1,039 human responses from 195 New York Times (NYT) debates, 448 human responses from 61 longer-form Boston Review (BR) forums, and 23,384 LLM-generated essays. In the NYT corpus, 65.3% of human main arguments are unique within a debate, compared to 3.4% of LLM main arguments. Asking LLMs to generate diverse answers adds variation, but a typical model recovers only about half of the distinct human main arguments, with much of the added variation falling outside the observed human argument space. Collapse also appears in sub-arguments, where among essays with the same main argument, 41.0% of human sub-arguments are unique versus 9.1% from LLM responses. Qualitatively, LLMs often reuse generalized and hedged sub-arguments, while humans prefer more concrete and topic-specific ones. Structure-wise, LLM-generated essays tend to follow a more fixed arc, often opening with a direct claim and moving quickly toward proposals. The same patterns hold in longer BR essays, suggesting that argument collapse extends beyond short-form responses.

</details>


### [422] [THRD: A Training-Free Multi-Turn Defense Framework for Jailbreak Attacks on Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01738)
*Zhiqing Ma,Zhonghao Xu,Dong Yu,Chen Kang,Changliang Li,Pengyuan Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出THRD，首个无需重新训练的框架，通过显式建模时间维度的风险累积来防御多轮越狱攻击，在保持模型实用性的同时将攻击成功率降至0.2-4.0%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多轮越狱防御方法要么依赖昂贵的重训练（损害模型效用），要么在每轮独立进行单轮分析，无法捕捉交互轨迹中风险的累积效应。观察到多轮交互中的安全行为具有轨迹依赖性，对话历史持续重塑模型条件上下文，单独评估每一轮是不够的。

Method: 提出THRD框架，包含四个模块：1) Turn-level Risk Assessor (TRA) 进行即时风险评估；2) Historical Context Analyzer (HCA) 检测跨轮意图升级；3) Response Evaluator (RE) 识别助长攻击的模型输出；4) Decision Module 通过时间演化评分机制（含衰减调制和趋势感知调整）整合上述信号。

Result: 在多种最先进的多轮攻击（包括树搜索和多智能体协作方法）下，THRD将攻击成功率降至0.2-4.0%，模型效用损失仅1.5%（MMLU和GSM8K）。消融实验验证了各模块的非冗余贡献和跨架构泛化能力。首次拒绝触发分析表明超过70%的多轮攻击需要在第2轮或之后才能检测到。

Conclusion: 验证了显式时间聚合在多轮越狱防御中的必要性，THRD是一种有效且高效的训练无关防御方案。

Abstract: Multi-turn jailbreak attacks pose a growing threat to LLMs by exploiting conversational dynamics such as gradual escalation and cross-turn coordination. Existing defenses either rely on costly retraining -- often degrading model utility -- or apply single-turn analysis independently at each turn, failing to capture how risk accumulates along interaction trajectories. We observe that safety behavior in multi-turn interaction is trajectory-dependent: dialogue history continuously reshapes the model's conditioning context, making it insufficient to evaluate each turn in isolation. Motivated by this insight, we present THRD, the first training-free framework that explicitly models temporal risk accumulation for multi-turn jailbreak defense. THRD integrates four modules: a Turn-level Risk Assessor (TRA) for instantaneous risk estimation, a Historical Context Analyzer (HCA) for cross-turn intent escalation detection, a Response Evaluator (RE) for identifying facilitative outputs, and a Decision Module that combines these signals through a time-evolving scoring mechanism with attenuation-based modulation and trend-aware adjustment. Experiments against state-of-the-art multi-turn attacks -- including tree-search-based and multi-agent collaborative methods -- across two target models show that THRD reduces ASR to 0.2--4.0% while preserving model utility within 1.5% degradation on MMLU and GSM8K. Ablation studies confirm non-redundant module contributions and stable cross-architecture generalization. Analysis of first rejection triggers reveals that over 70% of multi-turn attacks require Turn~2 or later to detect, validating the necessity of explicit temporal aggregation.

</details>


### [423] [Construction of Historical Knowledge Graphs Based on BERT and Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01747)
*Ping Li,Bartlomiej Brzozka*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合BERT和图神经网络（GNN）的高层架构，用于从历史文本中提取实体和关系，并开发了基于FastRQNet和Vilt-qaformer+RoBInet的图像检索系统，实验表明该方法在精度、召回率和F1分数上优于传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将大量传统历史文本通过数字人文研究和规模化历史数据分析转化为结构化知识图谱，解决历史文本中的语言歧义、上下文引用局限以及缺乏规范语法规则的问题。

Method: 采用BERT与GNN结合的架构进行实体和关系抽取，同时基于FastRQNet和预训练视觉-语言模型Vilt-qaformer+RoBInet开发图像检索系统。

Result: 联合BERT-GNN系统在精度、召回率和F1分数上均优于传统基于规则的方法和其他主流深度学习基线；能有效处理复杂嵌套结构和隐式引用问题。

Conclusion: 将关系图学习算法与上下文敏感的语义表示技术相结合，可以自动从历史数据中提取信息，为知识库积累智慧。

Abstract: Through digital humanities research and scale-up historical data analysis, a significant amount of traditional historical text is converted into structured knowledge graphs. This paper provides a high-level architecture that combines bidirectional encoder representations of transformers (BERT) and graph neural networks (GNN) to extract the entities and relationships from various types of historical texts. The texts of traditional history resolve linguistic ambiguities, references limited by context, and a lack of established grammatical norms in a systematic way. This study develops a new image retrieval system based on FastRQNet and pre-trained vision-language model Vilt-qaformer+RoBInet in accordance with the aforementioned recommendations. The experiments make full use of a comprehensive collection of municipal records, parliamentary documents, and historical correspondence. When compared to conventional rule-based techniques and other popular deep-learning baselines, the joint BERT-GNN system obtains greater Precision, Recall, and F1-score (Table 2). Complex nested structures and implicit reference issues can be handled by this structure with sufficient accuracy and thoroughness when creating knowledge graphs. The aforementioned experiments show that combining relational graph learning algorithms with context-sensitive semantic representation techniques can automatically extract historical data to add accumulated wisdom to the knowledge repository.

</details>


### [424] [HarnessForge: Joint Harness and Policy Evolution for Adaptive Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01779)
*Mingju Chen,Can Lv,Guibin Zhang,Heng Chang,Shiji Zhou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出HarnessForge框架，通过"工具-策略"协同进化实现LLM智能体系统的元适应，在多个基准上提升性能达12%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体系统在面对异构任务时缺乏全局性的系统级适应能力，外部工具与内部推理器之间的兼容性未得到联合优化。

Method: 将智能体系统形式化为工具-策略对（harness-policy pair），通过故障引导的工具裁剪和工具条件化的策略对齐实现协同进化。

Result: 在五个跨领域基准上，HarnessForge一致提升了Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B的性能，超越仅工具或仅策略的基线，最高提升12.0%。

Conclusion: 工具与策略的协同进化是有效的，两者之间的执行兼容性对智能体系统适应至关重要。

Abstract: LLM agents are increasingly expected to operate across heterogeneous task regimes that require distinct execution paradigms. This challenges fixed agent systems and motivates system-level meta-adaptation beyond isolated component updates. While existing works have adapted external harness or trained underlying reasoning policies, full-system adaptation remains insufficiently characterized. The adaptation space between structure and execution is rarely made explicit, and the compatibility between the external harness and the internal reasoner is not optimized jointly. We propose HarnessForge, a meta-adaptive framework for evolving LLM agent systems. HarnessForge formulates an agent system as a harness--policy pair, defining a stable adaptation space that separates harness-level execution structure from policy-level reasoning behavior. It then performs harness--policy co-evolution through fault-guided harness tailoring and harness-conditioned policy alignment. Experiments across five benchmarks from diverse domains show that HarnessForge consistently improves both Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B backbones, outperforming harness-only and policy-only baselines with gains of up to 12.0\% over the strongest baseline and achieving favorable rollout-efficiency tradeoffs, demonstrating that harness--policy co-evolution is effective, and that executable compatibility between the harness and reasoning policy is essential for agent-system adaptation. The code is available at https://github.com/mingju-c/HarnessForge.

</details>


### [425] [Multilinguality of Large Language Models From a Structural Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01800)
*Haruki Sakajo,Yusuke Sakai,Hidetaka Kamigaito,Taro Watanabe*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过表征结构分析探索LLM的多语言性，发现低资源语言在结构上与英语差异更大，且语言特定后训练会改变结构但保留语言间关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往研究仅关注词元表征层面，未能从语言固有的结构性视角理解LLM如何处理非英语文本。

Method: 采用表征结构分析方法，比较不同资源层级语言与英语之间的结构差异，并考察语言特定后训练的影响。

Result: 低资源语言在结构上与英语的差异显著大于高资源和中资源语言；语言特定后训练会改变模型结构，但语言间的结构关系得以保持。

Conclusion: 从结构视角揭示了LLM多语言性的内在规律，证明了结构性差异与语言资源水平相关，且后训练不影响跨语言结构关系。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have excelled in processing multiple languages through pre- and post-training on multilingual data, even though English dominates the training data. Prior work focusing on token representations has revealed how those LLMs process non-English text. Although these analyses have provided insightful findings, they fail to capture a structural view, which is an inherent property of language. In this study, we explore the multilinguality of LLMs through representational structural analysis. Our findings reveal that low-resource languages are structurally more different from English than high- and mid-resource languages, and that language-specific post-training alters their structures while preserving inter-language relationships.

</details>


### [426] [ProbeScale: Probing Analysis to Optimize Neural Scaling Laws for Efficient Small Language Model Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01806)
*Sourav Das*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: ProbScale是一个框架，通过结合神经缩放定律和探针分析，从预训练的小语言模型中识别出参数高效的子网络，在保持原始模型95%-98%性能的同时，实现5-10倍的参数缩减。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 小语言模型虽然比大模型更高效，但在严格资源约束下部署仍具挑战，需要进一步压缩模型同时保持性能。

Method: 利用缩放定律指导的预训练SLM的丰富内部表示，通过任务特定探针量化每层对目标能力的重要性，将子网络选择形式化为在参数预算下最大化聚合加权探针性能的层子集优化问题。

Result: 在RoBERTa-Large和T5-Base上，ProbScale实现5-10倍参数缩减，保持原始模型95%-98%的性能，优于启发式基线方法。

Conclusion: ProbScale有效统一了缩放定律和探针分析，为资源受限场景下SLM的高效部署提供了可行的子网络选择方案。

Abstract: Small Language Models (SLMs) offer a balance between capability and computational feasibility. Neural scaling laws inform their optimal training, suggesting that they possess rich internal representations that scale with their size. However, deploying even these SLMs can be challenging under strict resource constraints. Language model probing provides methods for analyzing the linguistic knowledge encoded in a model's internals. We propose ProbScale, a framework that unifies insights from scaling laws and probing to identify parameter-efficient subnetworks within pre-trained SLMs. ProbScale utilizes the high-quality representations of well-scaled SLMs and uses task-specific probes to mathematically quantify the relevance of each layer for target downstream capabilities. This allows selecting subnetworks that optimally trade off performance against parameter size. We formulate the subnetwork selection as finding a layer subset maximizing aggregated, task-weighted probe performance under a parameter budget. Experiments on representative SLMs such as RoBERTa-Large and T5-Base demonstrate that ProbScale identifies subnetworks achieving significant parameter reduction, from 5 to 10 times, while maintaining high performance (95% to 98% of the original SLMs) on targeted tasks, outperforming heuristic baselines.

</details>


### [427] ["I've Seen How This Goes": Characterizing Diversity via Progressive Conditional Surprise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01811)
*Matthew Khoriaty,David Williams-King,Shi Feng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于上下文学习的文本多样性度量方法Decan（D_{Ca_n}），通过单次前向传播利用语言模型对数概率计算多样性分数，无需嵌入模型、参考语料或人工标注。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 评估创意输出多样性对于分析后训练模式崩溃、比较解码策略以及量化AI与人类写作的创造性行为至关重要，现有方法需要专门的嵌入模型或人工标注。

Method: 基于信息论，利用语言模型的上下文学习能力，通过单次前向传播读取每个token的对数概率，计算per-byte得分D_{Ca_n} = C × a_n，可处理任意数量输入之间的相似性检测。

Result: 在McDiv基准上最优达到OCA 0.846（SentBERT为0.897）；在OLMo-2-7B后训练流程中，多样性随base→SFT→DPO→RLVR阶段单调下降，准确检测了创意写作关注的多样性损失。

Conclusion: Decan是一种无需专用模型或人工标注的通用多样性度量方法，可同时评估AI生成和人类写作的多样性，并能有效监测后训练过程中的模式崩溃现象。

Abstract: Measuring the diversity of creative outputs is central to evaluating post-training mode collapse, comparing decoding strategies, and quantifying creative behavior in both AI and human writing. We propose a new approach to measuring diversity using in-context learning, of which the ``Decan'' metric, $D_{Ca_n} = C \times a_n$, is the working instance we evaluate: a per-byte score read off the per-token log-probabilities of a base model $θ$ in a \emph{single forward pass} per permutation, with no embedding model, no reference corpus, and no human labels. This approach is grounded in information theory, makes use of language model in-context learning to detect a wide range of similarities between any number of inputs, and obviates the need to train a special-purpose model. The same pipeline scores AI samples and human-written response sets, with diversity treated as a property of (responses, prompt, scoring model). On Tevet and Berant's human-grounded McDiv benchmark, $D_{Ca_n}$ reaches OCA 0.846 on the McDiv prompt\_gen set where it performs best, behind the strongest neural baseline reported in Tevet and Berant (SentBERT, 0.897). On the OLMo-2-7B post-training pipeline, $D_{Ca_n}$ drops monotonically across the base $\to$ SFT $\to$ DPO $\to$ RLVR stages, detecting the type of diversity loss that creative-writing applications care about.

</details>


### [428] [Cost-Aware Diffusion Draft Trees for Speculative Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01813)
*Shuai Zhang,Huachuan Qiu,Hongliang He,Yong Dai*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出CaDDTree方法，通过联合优化树结构和节点预算来直接最大化token吞吐量，取代了传统方法中凭经验选择预算的做法，在多个基准测试中匹配或超越了带最优预算的DDTree。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有块扩散草稿方法（如DDTree）在固定节点预算下最大化期望接受长度，但接受长度随预算单调非减，无法为预算选择提供原则性依据，导致需要离线搜索最优预算。

Method: CaDDTree将草稿和验证延迟显式建模，将吞吐量目标分解为每轮的一维预算搜索问题，证明在凸验证成本下吞吐量函数是单峰的，从而采用高效的贪心停止规则，无需离线预算搜索。

Result: 在Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B上跨越推理、编码和指令遵循等八个基准测试中，CaDDTree在几乎所有任务上匹配或超越了使用最优预算选择的DDTree。

Conclusion: CaDDTree通过成本感知的预算自适应策略，在无需离线调参的情况下实现了与最优预算DDTree相当甚至更好的性能，为推测性解码提供了一种更实用的吞吐量优化方案。

Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates inference by having a lightweight drafter propose tokens verified in parallel by the target language model. Block diffusion drafters such as DFlash generate an entire draft block in one pass, yielding per-position marginals; DDTree uses these to build a candidate tree that maximizes expected acceptance length under a fixed node budget. We observe, however, that acceptance length is non-decreasing in budget: it always favors larger trees regardless of verification cost, offering no principled basis for budget selection. We introduce \textbf{CaDDTree} (Cost-aware Diffusion Draft Tree), a method that directly optimizes token throughput (expected tokens generated per unit time) by jointly selecting the tree structure and node budget. We model draft and verification latencies explicitly, show that the throughput objective decomposes into a per-round one-dimensional search over the budget, and prove that under a convex verification cost the throughput function is \emph{unimodal}, enabling an efficient greedy stopping rule. CaDDTree requires no offline budget search, adapting the budget each round from the current per-position distributions and verification cost. Experiments on Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B across eight benchmarks spanning reasoning, coding, and instruction-following tasks show that \caDDTree{} matches or surpasses DDTree with oracle budget selection on nearly all tasks.

</details>


### [429] [CRAB-Bench: Evaluating LLM Agents under Complex Task Dependencies and Human-aligned User Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01815)
*Danqing Wang,Akshay Sivaraman,Lei Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了CRAB-Bench和RUSE框架，用于在 realistic 服务场景中评估LLM Agent。最佳模型在CRAB-Bench上仅达到61% pass@1，使用RUSE后性能下降高达57%，信息泄露是最具破坏性的行为维度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估方法未能模拟真实服务场景中复杂的任务依赖、不完美的用户行为以及多解评估需求，需要更逼真的评估基准和用户模拟器。

Method: 提出CRAB-Bench（基于约束图的复杂任务生成）和RUSE（基于人类行为研究的真实用户模拟器，涵盖多样化人格和四个行为维度）。

Result: 最佳模型（前沿LLM Agent）在CRAB-Bench上仅61% pass@1；使用RUSE后性能下降高达57%；信息泄露是最具破坏性的行为维度；Agent在RUSE下更少承认错误，倾向于通过隐式修正掩盖错误。

Conclusion: 现有LLM Agent在 realistic 服务场景中表现有限，RUSE暴露了Agent在任务解决能力上的显著缺陷，而非对话质量。信息泄露行为对Agent性能破坏最大，且Agent倾向于掩盖而非承认错误。

Abstract: Evaluating LLM agents in realistic service scenarios requires complex task dependencies, imperfect user behavior, and an evaluation that accommodates multiple valid solutions. We introduce CRAB-Bench (Constraint-based Realistic Agent Benchmark) and RUSE (Realistic User Simulation Engine) to address this gap. CRAB-Bench generates tasks via a constraint graph over multiple interdependent entities with structured distractors, requiring agents to reason carefully over thousands of misleading candidates where only a tiny fraction of solutions are valid. RUSE replaces cooperative, template-like simulators with realistic users grounded in human behavioral studies, instantiated across diverse personas and four behavioral dimensions. Experiments on four frontier LLM agents show that the best model achieves only 61% pass@1 on CRAB-Bench, and switching to RUSE causes further drops of up to 57%, concentrated in task-solving ability rather than conversational quality. Information Disclosure is the most damaging behavioral dimension, and agents interacting with RUSE are less likely to admit mistakes, instead masking errors through implicit corrections.

</details>


### [430] [TalkTag: Fine-Grained Morphosyntactic Error Annotation for Transcribed Speech](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01820)
*Shamira Venturini,Oliver Hennhöfer,Steffen Kinkel,Jannik Strötgen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: TalkTag是一个基于LLM的轻量级工具，用于自动进行CHAT格式的形态句法错误标注，在低资源场景下表现出精准的标注能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 细粒度形态句法错误标注在临床和发展性语言研究中至关重要，但现有方法耗时、依赖专家且难以规模化，亟需自动化解决方案。

Method: 基于LLM微调的轻量级工具TalkTag，在极端数据稀缺条件下使用儿童叙事数据进行训练，自动化CHAT格式的口语转录错误标注。

Result: TalkTag能够产生令人鼓舞的精准标注，并能有效识别语言歧义导致标注困难的情况。

Conclusion: TalkTag为手动错误标注提供了可扩展的替代方案，为形态句法错误标注提供了实际可行的支持。

Abstract: Fine-grained morphosyntactic error annotation is important in clinical and developmental language research, yet it is labour-intensive, expert-dependent, and difficult to scale. We present TalkTag, an LLM-based lightweight tool fine-tuned to automate CHAT-style error annotation in spoken-language transcripts. Developed under conditions of extreme data scarcity using children's narrative data, the system shows the feasibility of linguistic analysis in low-resource settings. Our evaluation demonstrates that TalkTag produces encouragingly precise annotation while effectively identifying instances where linguistic ambiguity makes automated tagging genuinely complex. In summary, with TalkTag, we provide a scalable alternative to manual error annotation and practically viable support for morphosyntactic error annotation.

</details>


### [431] [LayerRoute: Input-Conditioned Adaptive Layer Skipping via LoRA Fine-Tuning for Agentic Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01838)
*Prateek Kumar Sikdar*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LayerRoute是一个轻量级适配器，通过逐层路由机制让Transformer模型在处理工具调用步骤时跳过15.25%的FLOPs（计划步骤仅跳过2.34%），在仅增加0.22%可训练参数的情况下提升模型质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前推理系统对不同类型步骤（工具调用与计划推理）采用相同计算量，忽略了它们在长度、复杂度、困惑度上的结构性差异，导致计算资源浪费。

Method: LayerRoute为Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct的24个Transformer块各添加一个线性路由层（897参数）和LoRA适配器（rank=8，约1.08M参数），通过直通估计器输出硬二值门控，在代理数据上训练3000步，利用门控正则化让模型自动发现每个输入类型下可跳过的块。

Result: 工具调用步骤跳过15.25% FLOPs，计划步骤仅跳过2.34%，跳过差异达12.91%；在工具调用和计划步骤上困惑度分别降低1.29和1.30；仅训练6.4分钟，可训练参数仅1.10M（占骨干网络0.22%）。

Conclusion: LayerRoute证明通过极少量可训练参数和极短训练时间，即可实现按输入类型自适应差异化计算分配，在节省计算资源的同时提升模型质量。

Abstract: Agentic language model systems alternate between two structurally distinct step types: structured tool calls (short, deterministic, low perplexity) and open-ended planning/reasoning steps (long, complex, high perplexity). Despite this heterogeneity, current inference systems apply identical compute to every step. We introduce LayerRoute, a lightweight adapter that learns to selectively skip transformer blocks on a per-input basis. LayerRoute augments each of the 24 transformer blocks in Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct with: (1) a per-layer router (~897 parameters, Linear(896,1)) that outputs a hard binary gate via the straight-through estimator, and (2) LoRA adapters (rank 8, ~1.08M parameters) on the Q/K/V/O attention projections. The backbone weights remain frozen. A single end-to-end training pass on agentic data (Hermes, Glaive, GSM8K, Turing) with a gate regularisation term forces the system to discover which blocks are skippable per input type. After 3,000 steps (6.4 minutes on an A100 40GB), LayerRoute achieves a 12.91% skip differential: tool calls skip 15.25% of FLOPs while planning steps skip only 2.34%, using only 1.10M trainable parameters (0.22% of the 494M backbone). Quality improves over the base model due to LoRA adaptation, with perplexity delta of -1.29 on tool calls and -1.30 on planning.

</details>


### [432] [Unveiling the Limits of Large Language Models in Inferring Pragmatic Meaning from Non-Verbal Responses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01845)
*Sugyeong Eo,Heuiseok Lim*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文首次系统评估了LLM从纯非言语回应中推断语用含义的能力，发现准确率相比言语回应下降高达60%，并通过上下文学习可以改善这一能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究主要关注LLM对言语行为的理解，但非言语行为是人类沟通的重要组成部分，尤其是在有意单独使用以传达间接含义时，目前缺乏对LLM理解非言语语用能力的研究。

Method: 设计了三个研究问题，对仅包含非言语回应的对话进行系统评估，比较LLM在非言语与言语情境下的语用推理表现，并进行错误分析和行为模式研究。

Result: LLM在推断非言语回应的潜在含义时表现困难，准确率相比言语回应下降高达60个百分点。通过深入分析发现了LLM解释非言语行为的行为模式。

Conclusion: LLM理解非言语语用含义的能力存在显著不足，但上下文学习可以有效促进其语用推理能力。

Abstract: Although large language models (LLMs) have shown considerable progress in pragmatic language understanding, prior research has focused mainly on their comprehension of verbal behavior. Nonetheless, non-verbal behavior remains a fundamental component of human communication, especially when deliberately utilized in isolation to convey indirect meanings. In this work, we present the first systematic evaluation of LLMs' ability to infer pragmatic meaning in dialogue consisting solely of non-verbal responses. We explore three research questions: (1) Can LLMs recognize indirect intent conveyed through non-verbal responses? (2) When and how do LLMs fail to capture non-verbal intent? (3) How can we improve LLMs' ability to interpret non-verbal intent?. Through the evaluation, we observe that LLMs struggle to infer underlying meaning from non-verbal responses, with accuracy dropping by up to 60% points compared to verbal ones. Further extensive analysis reveals a behavioral pattern in LLMs' interpretations of non-verbal behavior and demonstrates that in-context learning facilitates pragmatic inference.

</details>


### [433] [CultureForest: Understanding and Evaluating Cultural Norm Grounded Reasoning in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01879)
*Yangfan Ye,Xiaocheng Feng,Jialong Tang,Xiayu Cao,Zihan Zhang,Xiachong Feng,Baosong Yang,Bing Qin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了CultureForest基准，用于评估LLM的文化规范推理能力，发现模型虽具备文化知识，但在开放场景下推理能力不足，知识获取与有效使用之间存在瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究将LLM的文化智能简化为知识层面的问题，忽视了模型在真实场景中能否有效利用所学知识，存在评估缺口。

Method: 构建CultureForest基准，包含5,378个示例，覆盖8个领域、53个国家/地区，基于原子文化规范设计题目，支持从选择题到开放式生成的渐进式评估。

Result: 顶级模型在开放式设置下性能大幅下降，存在显著区域差异；测试时推理收益有限且可能加剧不公平；模型具有高度共享的区域偏好结构；模型回答趋于保守；知识获取与推理能力之间存在瓶颈。

Conclusion: 文化智能评估应从知识中心范式转向衡量知识驱动的推理能力。

Abstract: Existing research largely reduces cultural intelligence in LLMs to a knowledge-level problem, overlooking whether models can effectively utilize their acquired knowledge in realistic scenarios. To bridge this gap, we introduce CultureForest, a benchmark for \textit{Cultural Norm Grounded Reasoning}. Each question is grounded in a small set of atomic norms, enabling verifiable and attributable evaluation. CultureForest comprises 5,378 examples across 8 domains and 53 countries/regions, and supports a progressive evaluation from multiple-choice to open-ended generation. Extensive experiments reveal that even top-tier models degrade substantially in open-ended settings, accompanied by pronounced cross-region disparities. Through targeted analysis, we uncover several consistent patterns: (1) test-time reasoning yields limited gains and may exacerbate inequity; (2) models exhibit highly shared regional preference structures; (3) model responses are markedly conservative, especially under stricter cultural constraints; and (4) by disentangling cultural knowledge acquisition from cultural reasoning, we show that while LLMs possess substantial cultural knowledge, their performance is further bottlenecked by its effective use. These findings point to a necessary shift from knowledge-centric evaluation toward measuring knowledge-grounded reasoning.

</details>


### [434] [KliniskVestBERT: BERT Model Specialised to Norwegian Clinical Texts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01904)
*Christian Autenried,Cosimo Persia*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文介绍了KliniskVestBERT，一套基于挪威临床文本预训练的BERT模型套件，在多个临床NLP任务上优于基础模型，证明了领域特定预训练的重要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗领域的NLP应用日益增长，但通用语言模型难以充分理解临床语言的复杂性，需要专门针对临床语料预训练的模型来提升效果。

Method: 在Helse Vest的真实去标识化挪威临床文本语料上，对Nb-BERT-large、NorBERT3-large和ModernBERT三个现有模型进行继续预训练，语料涵盖bokmål和nynorsk两种挪威语形式的多种临床文档类型。

Result: 在三个合成挪威临床基准数据集和两个真实世界任务上，每个临床专用模型均持续优于对应的基线模型。

Conclusion: 领域特定的预训练显著提升了临床NLP任务的性能，验证了针对临床领域定制语言模型的有效性和必要性。

Abstract: The increasing application of Natural Language Processing (NLP) in healthcare demands language models specifically attuned to the complexities of clinical language. This work introduces KliniskVestBERT, a suite of three BERT-based encoder models pre-trained on a substantial corpus of real-world, de-identified Norwegian clinical texts from Helse Vest. We continue pretraining existing language models Nb-BERT-large, NorBERT3-large, and ModernBERT on our specialized clinical dataset. This dataset is based on a representative population of Helse Vest patients. The included document types are carefully curated to encompass a broad clinical spectrum in bokmål and nynorsk including discharge summaries, surgical reports, nursing notes etc. ensuring comprehensive representation of the linguistic landscape within Norwegian healthcare settings. Evaluation on three synthtetic Norwegian clinical benchmark datasets and two real-world problems demonstrates that each of our clinically specialized models consistently outperforms their baseline counterparts, highlighting the significant benefit of domain-specific pre-training for NLP tasks within the clinical domain. The project was a joint effort by all Helse Vest entities (Helse Bergen, Helse Fonna, Helse Førde and Helse Stavanger) with DIPS under the project lead of Helse Vest ICT.

</details>


### [435] [Mechanistic Diagnostics of Spatial Lexical Bias in Multimodal Large Language Model Spatial Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01914)
*Chuang Ma,Qianying Liu,Tomoyuki Obuchi,Fei Cheng,Wang Yang,Sudong Cai,Shuyuan Zheng,Akiko Aizawa,Sadao Kurohashi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文发现多模态大模型在空间多项选择题中存在“空间词汇偏差”——添加空间关系词会诱导模型选择错误选项。通过机理可解释性分析，发现该偏差主要源于语言侧而非视觉侧，并提出了轻量级LLM-only DPO微调方法，显著提升了模型在多项空间推理任务上的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大模型在空间多项选择题中表现不可靠，已有研究归因于视觉信息关注不足，但本文发现存在另一种互补的失败模式——空间词汇偏差，即答案选项中添加空间关系词会诱导模型做出错误选择。

Method: 使用9个开源多模态大模型进行实验，识别“二元稳定但三元脆弱”的案例作为诊断样本；运用视觉注意力分析、残差流探针、无关选项控制、激活修补及稀疏成分干预等机理可解释性工具定位偏差来源；提出轻量级LLM-only DPO微调方法，使用少量单目标对合成数据进行训练。

Result: 偏差主要源于语言侧而非视觉侧；LLM-only DPO微调使四路鲁棒准确率在合成数据上提升高达100个百分点，在WhatsUp、SpatialMQA-Direct和VSR数据集上分别提升68.0、32.6和20.1个百分点。

Conclusion: 空间词汇偏差是多模态大模型在空间推理任务中失败的重要原因，且可通过轻量级语言侧干预有效缓解，为提升MLLM空间推理能力提供了新的思路。

Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) remain unreliable on spatial multiple-choice questions, and their failures are often attributed to poorly attended visual information. In this work, we identify a complementary failure mode, spatial lexical bias: adding a spatial relation word to the answer options can attract the model's decision and make the newly added option likely to be selected. Using nine open-weight MLLMs, we show that this phenomenon is widely observed. In particular, models can answer a binary spatial question correctly, yet consistently select an incorrect third spatial option once it is added to the answer set. We isolate such binary-stable but ternary-fragile cases as diagnostic examples and leverage mechanistic interpretability tools, revealing that a substantial part of the failure instead originates on the language side rather than the visual side: visual attention analyses and residual-stream probes show the correct spatial relation remains internally available on these failures, while irrelevant-option controls, activation patching, and sparse component interventions trace the bias to specific LLM-side channels and neurons. Based on this finding, we show that a lightweight LLM-only DPO update on tiny single-object-pair synthetic data mitigates the bias, lifting four-way robust accuracy by up to 100 points on synthetic data, and by 68.0, 32.6, and 20.1 points on broader evaluation datasets WhatsUp, SpatialMQA-Direct, and VSR.

</details>


### [436] [Resonant Context Anchoring: Decoupling Attention Routing and Signal Gain at Inference Time](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01923)
*Mingkuan Zhao,Yide Gao,Wentao Hu,Suquan Chen,Tianchen Huang,Zhenhua An,Zetao Chang,Xiayu Sun,Yuheng Min*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Resonant Context Anchoring (RCA)，一种轻量级推理时干预方法，通过正交解耦自注意力中的路由逻辑与信息幅度，利用非线性整流构建动态增益场放大上下文token的value向量范数，在不改变注意力分布的前提下提升残差流中外部证据的信噪比，有效抑制LLMs的上下文忽视和事实幻觉。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLMs在面对与内部参数记忆冲突的外部输入证据时，表现出"上下文忽视"问题，导致持续性事实幻觉。现有方法（抑制神经元激活、对比解码等）要么增加困惑度，要么显著提升推理延迟，缺乏高效轻量的解决方案。

Method: RCA（谐振上下文锚定）：1）在自注意力模块中将路由逻辑（注意力分数）与信息幅度（value向量范数）正交解耦；2）利用原始softmax前的注意力分数作为语义对齐的即时度量；3）通过非线性整流构建动态增益场，选择性放大上下文token对应value向量的范数；4）不改变注意力概率分布，仅提升残差流中外部证据的信噪比。

Result: 在Llama-3系列模型上，RCA在多项事实一致性和强知识冲突任务中显著提升上下文忠实度，有效抑制参数性幻觉。作为无需训练、计算开销可忽略的即插即用模块，RCA在忠实度和流畅性上实现帕累托改进，同时保持模型通用语言理解能力。

Conclusion: RCA是一种有效的轻量级推理时干预方法，通过残差流信号动态视角解决了LLMs的上下文忽视问题，在无需额外训练和计算成本的前提下实现了事实忠实度与生成流畅性的双重提升。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) frequently exhibit "contextual disregard" when faced with input evidence that conflicts with their internal parametric memory, leading to persistent factual hallucinations. Existing mitigation strategies primarily rely on suppressing specific neuron activations or employing computationally expensive contrastive decoding mechanisms, which often result in increased perplexity or significantly elevated inference latency. To address these limitations, we propose Resonant Context Anchoring (RCA), a lightweight inference-time intervention method grounded in the perspective of residual stream signal dynamics. RCA aims to resolve the signal attenuation of external evidence during its propagation through deep networks. The core mechanism involves the orthogonal decoupling of routing logic and information magnitude within the self-attention module. By utilizing raw pre-softmax attention scores as an instantaneous metric of semantic alignment, we construct a dynamic gain field via non-linear rectification to selectively amplify the norms of value vectors corresponding to context tokens, without altering the attention probability distribution. This mechanism effectively elevates the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) of input evidence within the residual stream mixture, thereby robustly anchoring the generation trajectory to the truthful context during inference. Extensive experiments on the Llama-3 model series demonstrate that RCA significantly improves contextual faithfulness across multiple factual consistency and strong knowledge-conflict tasks, effectively suppressing parametric hallucinations. Furthermore, results confirm that as a training-free and computationally negligible plug-and-play module, RCA achieves a Pareto improvement in faithfulness and fluency while maintaining the model's general language understanding capabilities.

</details>


### [437] [Mitigating Bias in Locally Constrained Decoding via Tractable Proposals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01926)
*Meihua Dang,Linxin Song,Honghua Zhang,Jieyu Zhao,Guy Van den Broeck,Stefano Ermon*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出基于张量化有限自动机的全局约束解码方法（GCD/P-GCD），结合序列蒙特卡洛采样，在函数调用、关键词生成和SQL生成任务中比传统局部约束解码更快收敛且偏差更小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有局部约束解码（LCD）方法存在短视掩码导致的采样偏差和性能下降问题，而使用序列蒙特卡洛（SMC）方法虽然能缓解偏差，但如何设计有效的提议分布或势函数仍是关键挑战。

Method: 将约束条件表示为有限自动机并张量化以便GPU高效执行，构建全局约束解码（GCD）提议分布；利用张量化有限自动机与隐马尔可夫模型共享电路结构的特性，通过电路乘法得到概率化GCD（P-GCD）提议分布，同时编码目标分布的逻辑信息和概率信息。

Result: 在函数调用、关键词生成和SQL生成任务上，使用相同SMC采样设置时，（P-)GCD相比LCD提议分布能更快收敛到目标分布，且所需粒子数显著更少。

Conclusion: 提出的全局约束解码方法有效解决了LCD的偏差问题，为约束语言生成提供了一种更高效、更准确的采样方案。

Abstract: Generations from large language models often fail to conform to desired constraints such as JSON schema. Existing locally constrained decoding (LCD) approaches enforce constraints by myopically masking out next tokens, resulting in biased sampling and degradation in performance. Recent work uses sequential Monte Carlo (SMC) methods to mitigate such biases, but designing effective proposal distributions or potential functions remains a key challenge. In this work, we propose a generic approach to construct proposals and potentials for SMC sampling from $p_{\mathrm{lm}}( \cdot \mid \mathrm{constraint})$. First, we show that constraints specified as finite automata can be tensorized for efficient execution on GPUs, which we use to construct globally constrained decoding (GCD) proposals. In addition, leveraging the fact that tensorized finite automata share the same circuit structure as hidden Markov models, we circuit-multiply them to obtain the probabilistic GCD (P-GCD) proposals encoding both logical and probabilistic information about the target distributions. We evaluate (P-)GCD on the tasks of function calling, keyword-based generation, and SQL generation. Experiments show that under the same SMC sampling setup, compared to LCD proposals, (P-)GCD converges faster to the target distribution with significantly fewer particles.

</details>


### [438] [What to Format and How: A Benchmark and Workflow Approach for Document Formatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01936)
*Shihao Rao,Liang Li,Jiapeng Liu,Tong Lin,Bing Li,Xiyan Gao,Peng Fu,Jing Huang,Can Ma*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了DocFormBench基准和DocFormFlow方法，用于解决内容感知的文档格式化问题。DocFormFlow通过解耦目标定位与修改执行，在多个LLM和多模态模型上显著提升了格式化准确性并减少了token消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的文档格式化方法在内容感知场景下缺乏专用评估数据集，且现有方法在格式化过程中存在冗余文档阅读问题。

Method: 提出DocFormBench基准（扩展Text-to-Format评估到多样化格式化需求）和DocFormFlow工作流方法（将目标定位与修改执行解耦为"格式化的内容"和"如何格式化"两个步骤）。

Result: DocFormFlow在多个LLM和多模态模型上持续提升了格式化准确性，同时减少了token消耗。进一步分析表明，精确的目标定位是影响格式化性能的主要因素。

Conclusion: DocFormBench和DocFormFlow将促进未来更智能、更可靠的文档格式化研究。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have opened up new possibilities for automated document formatting. However, real-world formatting often requires identifying targets based on document content. This content-aware setting remains challenging and underexplored, primarily due to the lack of dedicated evaluation datasets.To enable evaluation in realistic content-aware scenarios, we introduce DocFormBench, a benchmark that extends Text-to-Format evaluation to diverse formatting requirements, along with metrics for both accuracy and efficiency.To mitigate redundant document reading in existing methods during formatting, we propose DocFormFlow, a workflow formatting method that decouples target localization from modification execution into what to format and how. Extensive experiments across multiple LLMs and multimodal models show that DocFormFlow consistently improves formatting accuracy while reducing token consumption compared to representative baselines. Further analysis reveals that precise target localization is the primary factor influencing formatting performance. We hope DocFormBench and DocFormFlow will facilitate future research toward more intelligent and reliable document formatting.

</details>


### [439] [Eyettention II: A Dual-Sequence Architecture for Modeling Fixation Location, Within-Word Landing Position, and Fixation Duration in Reading](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01964)
*Shuwen Deng,Cui Ding,David R. Reich,Paul Prasse,Lena A. Jäger*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Eyettention II，一种轻量级端到端深度学习模型，用于生成逼真的阅读眼动轨迹，解决了眼动追踪数据稀缺的问题，在扫描路径预测上超越现有模型并捕捉关键心理语言学现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 眼动追踪数据在语言模型增强、读者特征推断等应用中价值巨大，但数据收集成本高、资源密集，导致大规模数据集难以获取，亟需高效的数据生成方法。

Method: 提出Eyettention II，一种端到端训练的深度学习模型，可生成包含注视位置、词内落点和注视时长等完整注视属性按时间顺序排列的逼真扫描路径，模型轻量且可在有限GPU资源下高效训练。

Result: Eyettention II在扫描路径预测上超越现有最先进模型，能够模拟类似人类的注视行为，并成功捕捉关键的心理语言学现象。

Conclusion: 该模型有望推动自然语言处理发展、支持心理语言学实验材料预测试，并揭示超越理论认知模型编码范围的新见解。

Abstract: The way our eyes move while reading provides valuable insights into both the reader's cognitive processes and the properties of the text. In particular, eye-tracking-while-reading data has shown to be highly beneficial in various technological applications, such as enhancing and interpreting language models and inferring a reader's characteristics. However, these applications often rely on large-scale, data-driven models, which demand extensive eye-tracking datasets that are challenging to obtain due to the resource-intensive nature of data collection. To address the challenge of data scarcity, we develop Eyettention II, an end-to-end trained deep-learning model capable of generating realistic scanpaths consisting of a complete set of fixation attributes in chronological order, including fixation location, within-word landing position, and fixation duration. Our model is lightweight, efficiently trainable on limited GPU resources, and closely aligned with cognitive theories. We demonstrate that Eyettention II surpasses state-of-the-art models in scanpath prediction and mirrors human-like gaze behavior by capturing key psycholinguistic phenomena. With its robust performance, Eyettention II holds the potential to drive advancements in natural language processing, facilitate piloting the materials of psycholinguistic experiments, and uncover new insights beyond what is explicitly encoded in theoretical cognitive models.

</details>


### [440] [Training Prompt Matters: State-Adaptive Optimization for Robust Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01967)
*Wenhang Shi,Yiren Chen,Shuqing Bian,Zhe Zhao,Jinhao Dong,Pengfei Hu,Wei Lu,Xiaoyong Du*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文揭示训练阶段的提示词（prompts）对LLM的灾难性遗忘和泛化能力有显著影响，并提出状态自适应提示优化（SAPO）方法，通过动态调整训练提示词来减少遗忘并提升泛化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提示工程在推理阶段已被广泛研究，但训练阶段的提示词对学习动态的影响尚未被充分探索。现有微调范式假设语义等价的提示词会产生相同的学习效果，本文发现这一假设是错误的，需要更深入理解训练提示词的作用。

Method: 提出State-Adaptive Prompt Optimization (SAPO)，将训练提示词从静态输入转变为动态、状态自适应的变量，通过任务损失先验来识别更优的提示词，从而在微调过程中动态优化提示词。

Result: 在多个基准测试上，SAPO显著减轻了灾难性遗忘，同时提升了泛化能力，在性能上超越现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: 训练提示词对学习动态有重要影响，SAPO提供了一种轻量级且有效的微调策略，为鲁棒微调提供了实用方案。

Abstract: While prompt engineering is instrumental in maximizing the capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) during inference, the role of prompts during training remains critically underexplored. Prevailing fine-tuning paradigms typically treat training prompts as mere surface forms, assuming that semantically equivalent instructions yield identical learning outcomes. However, we reveal that this equivalence is deceptive: while paraphrased prompts often lead to comparable in-task performance, they induce drastically different cross-task impacts regarding catastrophic forgetting and generalization. Crucially, these impacts are positively correlated across tasks, indicating the existence of superior prompts that consistently yield better performance. Furthermore, we discover that these superior prompts can be robustly identified by task loss prior to learning. Leveraging these insights, we introduce State-Adaptive Prompt Optimization (SAPO), a lightweight yet effective training strategy that shifts task formulation from a static input to a dynamic, state-adaptive variable. Comprehensive experiments on diverse benchmarks confirm its effectiveness, which significantly mitigates forgetting while improving generalization, achieving substantial performance gains over state-of-the-art methods. These results provide insights into how training prompts shape learning dynamics and offer a practical recipe for robust fine-tuning. Our code is available at https://github.com/Eric8932/SAPO.

</details>


### [441] [MMG2Skill: Can Agents Distill In-the-Wild Guides into Self-Evolving Skills?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01993)
*Xinyu Che,Junqi Xiong,Yunfei Ge,Xinping Lei,Shihao Li,Hang Yan,Han Li,Yuanxing Zhang,Zhiqi Bai,Jinhua Hao,Ming Sun,Han Li,Jiaheng Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了MMG2Skill-Bench基准和MMG2Skill闭环框架，用于将从网络获取的多模态异构人类指南转化为智能体可执行的技能，并通过轨迹反馈持续改进，在GUI控制、开放游戏和策略卡牌等多个领域显著提升了VLM智能体的性能（宏观平均提升12.8-25.3个百分点）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网络上存在大量多模态、异构、含噪声且面向人类执行者的程序性知识，难以直接用于智能体执行长周期任务，因此需要弥合人类导向指南与智能体可执行技能之间的鸿沟。

Method: 提出了MMG2Skill闭环框架，包括三阶段：(1) 将多模态指南编译为可编辑的结构化技能；(2) 固定VLM智能体在执行过程中条件化这些技能；(3) 基于轨迹级的根因反馈（而非基准分数）修订技能，不依赖外部奖励信号。

Result: 在GUI控制、开放游戏和策略卡牌三种任务中，使用六种VLM骨干网络，MMG2Skill在每种模型-领域设置下均优于基线，宏观平均提升12.8-25.3个百分点。消融实验表明直接用原始指南提示智能体反而会降低性能，结构化技能构建和轨迹驱动修正确保了性能提升。

Conclusion: MMG2Skill有效实现了从人类指南到智能体技能的转化与持续优化，且在可推理成功率的任务中，校准后的分析器早期停止机制可防止后期性能退化并节省25%-53%的尝试次数。

Abstract: Abundant procedural knowledge on the Web holds great potential for helping agents solve long-horizon tasks. However, such knowledge is often multimodal, heterogeneous, noisy, and implicitly assumes human executors, making it difficult to use directly as the skills required by agents. To bridge the gap between human-oriented guides and agent-executable skills, we formalize this problem as guide-to-skill learning: converting in-the-wild guides into executable skills and continuously improving them from trajectories observable to the agent. To evaluate the capability of existing agents on this task, we introduce MMG2Skill-Bench, the first benchmark designed for this problem. We further propose MMG2Skill, a closed-loop framework that compiles guides into editable skills, conditions a fixed vision-language model (VLM) agent on these skills during execution, and revises the skills from trajectory-level root-cause feedback without using benchmark scores. Across GUI control, open-ended gameplay, and strategic card play with six VLM backbones, MMG2Skill consistently outperforms vanilla baseline agents in every model-domain setting, achieving macro-average gains of +12.8 to +25.3 percentage points across backbones. Ablation studies show that directly prompting agents with raw guides can degrade performance, while both structured skill construction and trajectory-driven revision are necessary for the observed improvements. On success-inferable tasks, analyzer-based early stopping further prevents late-stage performance regressions and saves 25%-53% of attempts when the success signal is properly calibrated.

</details>


### [442] [CARTE: A Benchmark for Mapping Language Model Knowledge Across France](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01995)
*Sarah Almeida Carneiro,Christos Xypolopoulos,Xiao Fei,Yang Zhang,Michalis Vazirgiannis*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了CARTE基准测试，包含2,431道选择题，用于评估大语言模型对法国13个大区及14个主题领域的细粒度区域知识理解能力，并发现模型在区域间存在显著性能差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试主要关注国家层面的文化理解，忽略了国家内部的区域差异以及模型对相近区域上下文进行区分的能力。

Method: 构建了CARTE基准（2,431道选择题，覆盖法国13个大区、14个主题领域）及CARTE-LV子集（聚焦语言变异），在少样本设置下评估了27个参数量从1B到12B的LLM。

Result: 不同模型规模和区域之间存在显著的性能差异，表明预训练覆盖存在系统性差距，模型对国家内部区域变化的鲁棒性有限。

Conclusion: 现有大语言模型在处理国家内部细粒度区域知识方面存在不足，CARTE基准可有效揭示这一缺陷。

Abstract: We introduce CARTE 1 (Culturally Anchored Regional-Territorial Evaluation), a multiplechoice benchmark for evaluating the ability of large language models (LLMs) to perform fine-grained reasoning over geographically grounded and regionally differentiated knowledge within France. While prior benchmarks focus on national-level cultural understanding, they largely overlook intra-country variation and the need to distinguish between closely related regional contexts. CARTE addresses this gap by introducing 2,431 questions spanning the 13 metropolitan regions of France and covering 14 thematic domains, including culture, language, demographics, economy, environment, and mobility. We further introduce CARTE-LV, a subset targeting Linguistic Variation across French regions, enabling focused evaluation of language-related differences. We evaluate 27 LLMs ranging from 1B to 12B parameters under few-shot settings. Our experiments reveal performance disparities across regions and model scales, suggesting systematic gaps in pretraining coverage and limited robustness to intra-national variation.

</details>


### [443] [Scaling Agentic Capabilities via Grounded Interaction Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02001)
*Wenhang Shi,Jinhao Dong,Yiren Chen,Zhe Zhao,Shuqing Bian,Wei Lu,Xiaoyong Du*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: GAIS是一个通过双阶段接地机制自动构建多样化环境和复杂任务以合成高质量智能体交互数据的框架，在多个基准上超越现有方法，实现数据高效且可扩展的智能体训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有依赖LLM合成智能体数据的方法存在无约束生成导致偏向内部先验、无法捕捉真实世界多样性和难度、难以构建高保真长程任务等问题，而人工标注成本过高，因此需要一种自动化的高质量数据合成框架。

Method: 提出GAIS框架，包含两个阶段：(1) 基于协议锚定的环境构建 —— 从真实世界MCP服务器派生环境以确保功能多样性和难度；(2) 结构引导的规划 —— 通过主动施加逻辑依赖和对抗策略在环境中生成复杂任务。

Result: 在BFCL、τ²-Bench和ACEBench上，GAIS合成数据显著优于现有基线，使基础模型匹配甚至超越官方指令微调版本。GAIS展现出更好的数据效率和可扩展性，用更少数据实现优秀性能，在基线停滞时仍持续增长。

Conclusion: GAIS通过双阶段接地机制成功解决了智能体交互数据合成中多样性和任务复杂性的问题，为通用智能体智能的发展提供了高效、可扩展的数据合成方案。

Abstract: General agentic intelligence hinges on the ability to interact with diverse real-world tools to complete complex tasks, a capability fundamentally tied to the quality of interaction data. To bypass the prohibitive costs of human annotation, prevailing paradigms depend entirely on Large Language Models (LLMs) to scale the synthesis of agentic environments and tasks. However, such unconstrained generation often degenerates into biased random sampling of LLMs' internal priors, failing to capture the diversity and difficulty of real-world domains or construct high-fidelity, long-horizon tasks. In this work, we introduce Grounded Agentic Interaction Synthesis (GAIS), a framework that automates the scalable construction of diverse environments and complex tasks via a two-phase grounding mechanism. Specifically, we construct protocol-anchored environments derived from real-world Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to ensure functional diversity and difficulty. Subsequently, we employ structure-guided planning to navigate these environments, actively enforcing logical dependencies and adversarial policies to generate complex tasks. Experiments on BFCL, $τ^2$-Bench, and ACEBench demonstrate that GAIS-synthesized data significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, enabling base models to match or even surpass their official instruction-tuned counterparts. Furthermore, GAIS exhibits superior data efficiency and scalability, achieving exceptional capabilities with significantly less data while maintaining continuous growth where baselines stagnate. Our code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/Eric8932/GAIS.

</details>


### [444] [Machine Learning for Coding Retail Product Names to Consumer-Price Categories: A Rule-plus-Bag-of-Words Pipeline with Reliability-Weighted Human-in-the-Loop Labeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02004)
*Vladimir Beskorovainyi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了一种将非标准化产品描述映射到消费分类（如UN COICOP）的通用方法，采用文本归一化、前缀树规则预分类和二元确认模型三步流程。实验表明词袋模型即可达到约0.99的F1分数，约67个标注样本即可满足需求，同时比较了不同标注聚合方法的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着扫描数据、网页抓取数据和交易/收据数据等替代数据源在消费价格测量中日益普及，这些数据中的产品描述通常简短、嘈杂且没有标准产品代码，难以直接进行价格比较。因此需要一种将产品描述映射到标准消费分类方案的通用、可复现方法。

Method: 提出三步流水线：(i) 文本归一化和分词处理噪声产品名称；(ii) 基于前缀树（trie）的规则预分类器，利用每个类别的关键词和停用词；(iii) 每个类别的二元确认模型判断物品是否属于暂定类别。使用人在环协议进行大规模标注，通过动态更新的可靠性权重聚合标注结果，支持持续微调。

Result: 在受控无泄漏实验中，词袋模型即可达到约0.99的F1分数，线性分类器与多层感知机表现相当，显式词序特征无额外收益，约67个标注样本已足够。标注协议研究中，可靠性加权投票略优于简单多数投票，而Dawid-Skene方法恢复标签效果明显更好。

Conclusion: 该研究表明分类任务比预期简单，词袋模型即可达到极高精度；但标签质量至关重要，Dawid-Skene是更好的标注聚合方法。研究为统计机构使用交易数据时的价格水平质量控制和系统设计提供了经验教训。

Abstract: Consumer-price measurement increasingly draws on alternative data sources -- scanner, web-scraped, and transaction/receipt data. A recurring obstacle is that product descriptions in such sources are short, noisy, and abbreviated, with no standard product code, so each item must first be mapped to a consumption classification (e.g., the UN COICOP scheme) before prices can be compared. This paper studies that mapping as a general, reproducible method. The pipeline is: (i) text normalization and tokenization of noisy item names; (ii) a prefix-tree (trie) rule-based pre-classifier driven by per-category key-phrases and stop-phrases; and (iii) a per-category binary confirmation model deciding whether an item belongs to a tentatively assigned category. For labels at scale we use a human-in-the-loop protocol in which annotators give a binary valid/reject judgment, aggregated by a dynamically updated reliability weight; the model joins the same rule, enabling continual fine-tuning. Our empirical finding is deflationary: in a controlled, leakage-free study (one category, real positives vs. hard negatives, five seeds), bag-of-words models essentially saturate the task (F1 about 0.99) -- a linear classifier matches a multilayer perceptron, explicit word-order (n-gram) features add nothing, and about 67 labeled examples already suffice. A Monte-Carlo study of the labeling protocol shows the reliability-weighted vote barely beats plain majority (its additive weights saturate) while Dawid-Skene recovers labels markedly better. We also discuss price-level quality control and design lessons for statistical offices considering transaction data. All figures are illustrative; no confidential data, code, or documentation is reproduced.

</details>


### [445] [Automated Essay Scoring and Language Certification: Assessing Generalizability, Agreement and Validity for French](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02009)
*Rodrigo Wilkens,Rémi Cardon,Vincent Folny,Thomas François*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个增强版的基于论证的验证框架（ABV），用于更全面地评估自动作文评分系统，并在法语AES任务上比较了8种模型架构，验证了该框架的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自动作文评分（AES）的基准测试实践过于简化，缺乏多维度的系统评估，尤其是在高风险语言测试场景下，需要更全面的验证框架。

Method: 在ABV框架基础上增加了公平性分析、与语言学特征的相关性、预测误差评估以及与人类评分者的一致性比较；在27,000篇考试作文（每篇2个评分者）和961篇泛化语料（每篇至少9个评分者）上比较了8种模型架构。

Result: 所提出的增强ABV框架能够更好地理解AES模型的能力和缺陷，同时推动了法语AES的最新技术水平。

Conclusion: 多维度的ABV框架能够提供比传统基准测试更深入的模型评估视角，有助于更全面地理解AES系统的表现与局限。

Abstract: In Automated Essay Scoring (AES), benchmarking practices have fostered minimalist evaluation practices, in contrast with the broader-view recommendations of evaluation frameworks, such as the argument-based validation framework (ABV), which argued in favor of a multidimensional assessment of systems, especially in the context of high-stakes language tests. In this paper, we introduce an enhanced and more practical version of the ABV framework, incorporating fairness analysis, correlations with linguistic features, prediction error evaluation, and model agreement compared with human raters. Applying this framework to French AES, we compare 8 model architectures on a corpus of 27k exam essays (2 raters each) and a generalization corpus of 961 essays (at least nine raters each). Our analyses illustrate the benefits of applying the ABV framework to better understand the capabilities and pitfalls of AES models, while also advancing the state-of-the-art for French AES.

</details>


### [446] [PlanarBench: Evaluating LLM Spatial Reasoning via Planar Graph Drawing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02010)
*Oleksandr Nikitin*
